columns.name: commitment_id
columns.description: Optional FK to commitments — null for keeper-initiated pings

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: FK to people — who was pinged

columns.name: channel
columns.description: Which channel the ping was sent through

columns.name: message
columns.description: The message body that was sent

columns.name: slack_channel_id
columns.description: Slack DM channel ID — needed for reply polling

columns.name: slack_thread_ts
columns.description: Slack message timestamp — acts as thread ID for reply polling

columns.name: gmail_thread_id
columns.description: Gmail thread ID — needed for reply polling

columns.name: replied_at
columns.description: When the first reply was detected — null until reply arrives
